message:
Command `STEP32="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/32-openroad-globalrouting"

nohup /nix/store/zzypcxbrgw1qink1l7fwgwpbk7fvdwpg-openroad/bin/openroad \
    -no_splash \
    -exit \
    /tmp/fix_bterm_ports.tcl \
    > /tmp/fix_bterm.log 2>&1 &

echo "OpenROAD fix PID: $!"
echo $! > /tmp/fix_bterm.pid

sleep 90
ps -p $(cat /tmp/fix_bterm.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "ENDED"
tail -15 /tmp/fix_bterm.log` executed with exit code 0.
